title: Dinguz's Horror Pack
description: A Horror modpack that will make your world ten times more scary.
body:
Dinguz's Horror Pack is another modpack made by Dinguz. This modpack will make your game a lot more scary.

## Some advancements will make you wonder

![Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc7c16413d14d08c3da4fa688fe3a9f41110998e.png)
----------
## Many scary creatures are waiting for you in the dark!
![thesilence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/541c44a4efef57413c302b2647fea69a8a807a34.png)![fromthefog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f43c9037f22fb7ddb798d481e86c8fa27351d7d3.png)![midnightlurker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29c0c36854503f339b6fba455bb992ad795a5274.png)![themanfromthefog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20291a32ae0e18e06fda172fcbdf43fef7bd53f0.png)
![theknocker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fd16fd48a8b285c7a9d66235d4754a6c453f21a.png)
-------------
![newest version: 1.0.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ceeddd0687bc05e979610096c21c0fbdf432ac6c.png)
> Fabric version soon!
